[2018-05-21 19:38] itsotter: well, i don't say "that's dumb" because i think it makes any particular game unfair
[2018-05-21 19:39] itsotter: i say it because as a non-paying player, my gameplay experience is different from a paying player's gameplay experience, ie he will have more bonus units in his games on average than i do
[2018-05-21 19:39] itsotter: i thought paying was only supposed to grant cosmetics and singleplayer
[2018-05-21 19:41] jamesa7171: (If that's in response to my wall of text, that was about MasN and not you)
[2018-05-21 19:44] supergreyman (Greyman): I think "paying for extra experience" isn't much of a bad thing. I think it falls into a similar category as "paying for extra campaign experience".
[2018-05-21 19:45] itsotter: it's misleading though right
[2018-05-21 19:45] itsotter: everyone's multiplayer ranked experience isn't the same, people who pay get a different experience
[2018-05-21 19:45] itsotter: i think it'd be much cleaner if paying really just granted cosmetics and the singleplayer content, and the multiplayer was truly equal
[2018-05-21 19:45] crash_overlord: It's not better or worse though, it's just different. YOu could argue someone with more emotes has a different experience aswell.
[2018-05-21 19:45] itsotter: eg every game has the same chance at bonus units
[2018-05-21 19:45] itsotter: emotes aren't gameplay-affecting, bonus units are
[2018-05-21 19:45] crash_overlord: i agree with the concept though, not a fan of "locking" b+11
[2018-05-21 19:46] crash_overlord: lowering the chances for non-paying people
[2018-05-21 19:46] crash_overlord: But on the other hand 🤷

[2018-05-21 19:49] itsotter: i previously assumed multiplayer gameplay was the same for everyone, pay or not
